Feature:AMO001 Get Member Wallet Balance 119ms 5

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant wallet balance API
So that I can retrieve the member wallet balance for one or more currencies

Scenario:
Get balances for requested currencies
51ms 4

Given a merchant member exists 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 49ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 30.25,
                "THB": 0
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 30.25,
                "THB": 0
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Setup:

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 14ms
field value
platform_username
currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "platform_username",
                "message": "\"platform_username\" is not allowed to be empty"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info

        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 20ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["USD","MYR","INVALID"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "USD",
            "MYR",
            "INVALID"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "currencies.1",
                "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"
              },
              {
                "key": "currencies.2",
                "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info

Feature:AMO013 Notify Wager Update < 1ms 3

As APISYS
I want to notify the merchant of wager updates

Scenario:
Successful wager notification
< 1ms 2

When APISYS notifies wager update with: < 1ms 

{
  "notification_type": "typeA",
  "notifications": [
    {
      "game_type": "IMSPORT",
      "game_key": "IMSPORT",
      "wager_no": "0001-20250117140015-188011927396-3",
      "origin_wager_no": "0001-20250117140015-188011927396-1",
      "ticket_no": "ticketno_123",
      "platform_username": "member01",
      "type": 3,
      "status": 2,
      "currency": "CNY",
      "amount": 10.1,
      "payment_amount": 10.1,
      "effective_amount": 10,
      "profit_and_loss": 5.1,
      "wager_time": 1720694402,
      "settlement_time": 1720698600,
      "is_system_reward": true
    },
    {
      "game_type": "CRASH",
      "game_key": "CRASH_V2",
      "wager_no": "0002-20250117140015-188011927398-1",
      "origin_wager_no": null,
      "ticket_no": null,
      "platform_username": "member02",
      "type": 1,
      "status": 2,
      "currency": "CNY",
      "amount": 5.1,
      "payment_amount": 5.1,
      "effective_amount": 5,
      "profit_and_loss": 0,
      "wager_time": 1720694403,
      "settlement_time": null,
      "is_system_reward": false
    }
  ]
}
 

Then(/^APISYS notifies wager update with:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Then the AMO013 response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the AMO013 response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Feature:AMO003 Seamless Request Payment 22s 322ms 4 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant request payment API
So that I can deduct wager payment from the member wallet

Scenario:
Successful request payment deducts wallet balance
13s 710ms 5 2 1

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given the member has positive wallet balance in "<currency>" 27ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 30.25
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

    CNY:
        30.25

When APISYS requests payment with: 4s 728ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
transaction_no <transaction_no>
currency <currency>
amount <amount_exceeding_balance>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-payment
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "044a0761-010e-4c34-8207-4fbddc3eff18",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": -40.25
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "044a0761-010e-4c34-8207-4fbddc3eff18",
              "status": 2,
              "fail_reason": 3
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-payment
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "044a0761-010e-4c34-8207-4fbddc3eff18",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": -40.25
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "044a0761-010e-4c34-8207-4fbddc3eff18",
              "status": 2,
              "fail_reason": 3
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO003 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: 1ms
field value
reference_id <transaction_no>
status 2
fail_reason 3

When APISYS requests payment with: 2s 1ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
transaction_no <transaction_no>
currency <currency>
amount 5
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-payment
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "c46d1e9e-2dcd-4e91-bfb1-c7ae6cdcd917",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": 5
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "\"amount\" must be a negative number"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info

Request:

    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "19ded0e0-7aed-4b91-852a-3c635b92c373",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": -1.1234567
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Feature:AMO007 Seamless Settle Wager 94ms 4

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant settle wager API
So that I can apply wager settlement results to the member wallet

Scenario:
Full settlement credits the wallet
36ms 2 2 2

Feature:AMO009 Seamless Resettle Wager 37ms 2

I want to call the merchant resettle wager API
So that I can apply corrected settlement amounts

Scenario:
Resettlement increases the wallet balance
18ms 2 2 2

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info +

    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

              "balances": {

              }
            },

        }

    Payload:

          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 30.25

            },

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 155.375
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        155.375

Info

When APISYS requests transfer in with: 33ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 50
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "9824c12b-1983-4908-8f97-b9f18d92c810",
          "game_type": "",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "50",
          "session_id": "d03883ad-ec25-43eb-a476-baa25ebbb8f9"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "b9b58322-fe1c-4209-bc0d-a9cd9e588600",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info

Then the AMO010 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id <amo010_reference_id>
status 1

    Payload:

When APISYS requests transfer in with: 14ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 1.1234567
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "cdfc1cca-f5b0-4f1b-9b4a-d39bc9e58a24",
          "game_type": "",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "1.1234567",
          "session_id": "7484bff5-7ab7-4b45-bdb1-bbb170115bea"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info

When APISYS requests transfer in with: 38ms
field value

game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 10

Feature:AMO011 Request Transfer Out 500ms 7 2 2

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant transfer out API
So that I can debit funds from the member wallet

Scenario:
Transfer out decreases wallet balance
96ms 6 1

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given the member has positive wallet balance in "<currency>" 29ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 175.375
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        175.375

Info

    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 175.375
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

When APISYS requests transfer out with: 42ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -20.5
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "c2a444bf-e9d5-438f-bb1a-0041178077a7",
          "game_type": "",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-20.5",
          "session_id": "c216014f-57f5-401e-8cef-2eb757d675c1"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "3d380742-d90f-4e33-bdd1-b44b007c31f1",
              "amount": -20.5,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "c2a444bf-e9d5-438f-bb1a-0041178077a7",
          "game_type": "",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-20.5",
          "session_id": "c216014f-57f5-401e-8cef-2eb757d675c1"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "3d380742-d90f-4e33-bdd1-b44b007c31f1",
              "amount": -20.5,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
amount -20.5
status 1

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should decrease by 20.5 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance in "([^"]*)" should decrease by 20.5$/, function(arg1, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -15
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "71312e1c-d935-450f-9b43-97024164b616",
          "game_type": "",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-15",
          "session_id": "f9c0bc91-9ad0-4278-af7a-6a3b64746e5c"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "27cc4d1a-48c1-47d8-8ace-f0184557b7cd",
              "amount": -15,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out

          "status": 200,
          "body": {

          }
        }

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
amount -15
status 1

And I store the response field "reference_id" as "amo011_reference_id" < 1ms

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should decrease by 15 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance in "([^"]*)" should decrease by 15$/, function(arg1, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Given I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>" < 1ms

When APISYS requests transfer out with: < 1ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -15
session_id <session_id>

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id <amo011_reference_id>
amount -15
status 1

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should remain unchanged < 1ms

          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 139.875
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

    CNY:
        139.875

field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "c8a67fc5-4bd8-4624-bad2-44fe65fa8628",
          "game_type": "",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "session_id": "a9ae0db4-bd55-41e3-a3f4-63e7143b78da"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "fc63c69d-f65c-456f-bdc1-3b135530d66b",
              "amount": -139,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "c8a67fc5-4bd8-4624-bad2-44fe65fa8628",
          "game_type": "",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "session_id": "a9ae0db4-bd55-41e3-a3f4-63e7143b78da"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "fc63c69d-f65c-456f-bdc1-3b135530d66b",
              "amount": -139,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
status 1

And the response amount should equal the integer part of the recorded wallet balance in "<currency>" < 1ms

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should equal the remaining decimal balance 18ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 0.875
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Remaining decimal check:
    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        139.875
    After:
        0.875
    Expected:
        0.875

Info

        }

When APISYS requests transfer out with: 15ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -1.1234567
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "c13a6257-af31-430d-a158-efff4397b6f6",
          "game_type": "",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-1.1234567",
          "session_id": "523609f3-1f7e-4a4d-a962-cfbabe771fb3"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info

    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out

Feature:Integration Flow - Transfer out all integer balance < 1ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant transfer APIs in sequence
So that I can verify full integer-balance withdrawal behavior end to end

Scenario:
Transfer in 120.5 then transfer out without amount deducts 120 and leaves 0.5
< 1ms 7 4

Given a merchant member exists with platform username "<platform_username>" < 1ms 

Then(/^a merchant member exists with platform username "([^"]*)"$/, function(arg1, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests transfer in with: < 1ms
transfer_no
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 120.5

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the wallet balance for "<platform_username>" in "<currency>" should become 120.5 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance for "([^"]*)" in "([^"]*)" should become 120.5$/, function(arg1, arg2, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests transfer out with: < 1ms
transfer_no
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain: < 1ms
status success
amount 120

And the wallet balance for "<platform_username>" in "<currency>" should become 0.5 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance for "([^"]*)" in "([^"]*)" should become 0.5$/, function(arg1, arg2, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: < 1ms
platform_username
currencies <currency>

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain balances: < 1ms
0.5 

Then(/^the response should contain balances:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Feature:Integration Flow - Transfer lifecycle through merchant wallet APIs < 1ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant wallet APIs in sequence
So that I can verify transfer credit, debit, reversal, and balance retrieval end to end

Scenario:
Transfer in 100, get balance, transfer out 35, get balance, cancel transfer, get balance
